name: BatteryLake: Agentic, Physics-Grounded Curation of Heterogeneous Battery Aging Data and Benchmarking
summary: arXiv:2607.09762v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Public battery aging datasets are a critical asset for advanced health management, but their practical use is often limited by inconsistent formats,...
description: arXiv:2607.09762v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Public battery aging datasets are a critical asset for advanced health management, but their practical use is often limited by inconsistent formats, unclear schemas, and metadata scattered across repositories and publications. Current curation remains largely manual and hard to reproduce, while general-purpose data integration tools miss the domai...
author: Tianwen Zhu, Hao Wang, Yonggang Wen
